_readme: Pick scenes from image-prompt-library.json using the 'scene' field.
Set 'type' to 'hero' or 'break' to choose the right variant.
Override with a custom 'prompt' if no library scene fits - 'scene' is ignored when 'prompt' is set.
Override 'altText' to customise the HTML alt text for SEO.
Run: Actions > Generate Site Images (manual trigger) after editing.
To regenerate one image: delete its r2Key from image-manifest.json, re-run workflow.
DO NOT change 'key' values - referenced by index.astro.
No emoji or special characters in this file.

images.altText: Doctor dictating patient notes using Dragon speech recognition software in a modern Australian clinic
Modern Australian clinic administration desk with Dragon voice recognition headset
Professional desktop microphone for Dragon speech recognition software

_siteConfig.note: Dragon / speech recognition sites use: hero=doctor-surgery, feat1=clinic-desk, feat2=microphone-closeup
